note: Records 00735 and 03665 are annotation-only (no signal files) and are excluded. patient_id == record id. Machine .qrs beats are the oracle R-peaks; the causal detector in beatstate_af/preprocessing/qrs.py provides the deployable R-peaks. Frozen before the confirmatory kill gate; do not edit (fork a v2).
label_rule: AFIB rhythm segments -> y=1; all other rhythms (N, AFL, J) -> y=0 (standard AFDB AF-detection labeling).
